Display Assessment Tool
Make a big impact
with your customers.
A unique tool designed to inspire, engage and lead the thinking in your CGC sessions. Assess in-store display execution against global CGC principles and co-create powerful action plans with your customers.
New Session
Start a new display review session. Upload customer photos, score execution against CGC principles and build a clear picture to share with your customer.
Existing Sessions
Pick up where you left off. Review and revisit completed assessment sessions and track progress across your customers.
